query:
SELECT 
  id,
  openingName,
  puzzleCount,
  LENGTH(puzzlesJson) as puzzlesJson_length,
  SUBSTRING(puzzlesJson, 1, 100) as puzzlesJson_preview,
  createdAt
FROM training_sets
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute 
SELECT 
  id,
  openingName,
  puzzleCount,
  LENGTH(puzzlesJson) as puzzlesJson_length,
  SUBSTRING(puzzlesJson, 1, 100) as puzzlesJson_preview,
  createdAt
FROM training_sets
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
